title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: Bots now exceed human web traffic; Google AI Overviews reduce click-through rates; AI agents increasingly act on behalf of users for browsing and commerce. The video argues this represents a fundamental handoff of internet control from humans to machines.
writeup: The video documents a shift in who, or what, drives internet traffic: bots now exceed humans on the web, Google AI Overviews cut click-through rates to source sites, and AI agents increasingly browse and transact on behalf of users. The argument is that these trends amount to a handoff of internet control from humans to machines. The concrete takeaways: automated traffic has surpassed human traffic, AI summaries reduce the clicks that publishers depend on, and agent-driven browsing and commerce are growing.
